meaning: n.女儿adj.女儿的,如女儿的,关系如女儿的
examples: She bore him a daughter, Susanna.
Her daughter is very dear to her.
Comedian Jasper Carrott's wife has saved their daughter's life by donating one of her kidneys.
Another legend tells of a half-troll whose daughter was pushed onto a passing iceberg by her cousin.
